deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: WWW reachability and database backend. Device plane (agent/OTBR) stays local.
deployment.saved: Saved. mDNS/publish providers updated in config/runtime.json.
deployment.wwwDescription: How you open the UI. Local modes always include IP:port and mDNS.

wwwModeHelp.local: Self-hosted on this machine. HTTP + HTTPS on LAN/mDNS.
wwwModeHelp.local_published: Same as local, plus public HTTPS (port-forward, domain, Pinggy, Cloudflare, ngrok, Tailscale…).
wwwModeHelp.cloud: UI in the cloud; home keeps agent/OTBR. With local DB, tunnel Supabase+agent. With cloud DB, tunnel agent.

deployment.accessHint: Replace <lan-ip> with this host’s LAN address. Public HTTPS needs port-forward or an enabled tunnel provider.
deployment.dbDescription: Catalog, auth, automation configs. Switch hot-reloads after probe + merge.

dbModeHelp.local: Bundled Supabase. Also usable by cloud WWW via home bridge tunnel.

deployment.mergeHelp: Copy/upsert catalog from current DB into the target, then swap.
deployment.probeOk: Target DB reachable and schema OK.
deployment.matrixDescription: Every WWW mode works with every DB mode. Cloud UI + local DB automatically bridges Supabase + agent.
deployment.publishQueued: Queued on home host — tunnels reconcile shortly.
